title: Slayer
description:
Complete tasks for the Slayer Master, and spend Slayer Points!
Supports MythicMobs
body:
# Features
Players can receive a task by typing /slayer

Once they complete the task they will receive Slayer Points.

Slayer Points can be used in the Slayer Shop to purchase items, perks, and more.


# Commands
/slayer - This opens the Slayer menu.

/slayer <player> - Open the Slayer menu to another player.

/slayer <player> -s - Open the Slayer menu to another player without sending yourself a message.

/canceltask [<player>] - Cancel a players current task

/collectreward [<player>] - If a player has an unclaimed reward, force them to claim it

/slayerbuy [<player>] - Force a player to buy an item from the shop

/starttask [<player>] - Force a player to start a task if they don't currently have one

/givepoints <amount> <player> - Give slayer points to a player

/givepoints <amount> <player> -s - Give slayer points to a player without sending yourself a success message.

# Permissions
slayer.open - Ability to use /slayer, if you don't make a Slayer Master NPC you should give this permission to everyone.

slayer.openothers - Ability to use /slayer <player>

slayer.canceltask - /canceltask (requires slayer.canceltask.others to cancel other players tasks)

slayer.collectreward - /collectreward (requires slayer.collectreward.others to make other players collect their rewards)

slayer.slayerbuy - /slayerbuy (requires slayer.slayerbuy.others to make other players buy items)

slayer.starttask - /starttask (requires slayer.starttask.others to make other players start tasks)

slayer.givepoints - /givepoints

# Configuration
Slayer tasks and items in the shop are fully configurable, along with some other options. Configuration instructions are generated in the default config.yml
Contains a language file.

# Placeholders
The plugin supports PlaceholderAPI. If installed, the following placeholders are available:
%slayer_points% - Current slayer points

%slayer_tasks_completed% - Amount of completed tasks

%slayer_kills% - Current task progress

%slayer_required_kills% - Kills required for current task

%slayer_current_task_name% - Current task name

%slayer_current_task_entity% - Entity to kill for current task

# Note
You can use https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/citizens.13811/ and https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/citizenscmd.30224/ to create a Slayer Master NPC.
